testcase.name: verifyClicksTabScrolls
testcase.system-out: Browser launched Opening Cashback Home Page --- STARTING TEST: Clicks Tab Scroll Check --- --- TEST PASSED: Clicks Tab Scroll Check ---

testcase.name: verifyPendingTabScrollsAndMatchesHeader

testcase.name: verifyDeclinedTabScrolls
testcase.system-out: Opening Cashback Home Page --- STARTING TEST: Declined Tab Scroll Check --- --- TEST PASSED: Declined Tab Scroll Check ---

testcase.name: verifyTotalEarningsHeaderFormula
testcase.system-out: Opening Cashback Home Page --- STARTING TEST: Total Earnings Header Formula --- Header Formula Verification: -> My Earnings (Confirmed) Header : $14.44 -> Pending Payments Header : $1.39 -> Expected Combined Aggregation : $15.83 -> UI Reported Total Earnings : $15.83 --- TEST PASSED: Total Earnings Header Formula ---
